docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY SHAMIEH, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT IRELAND, JULIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-06-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAMIEH, SUSAN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAMIEH, SUSAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IRELAND, JULIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
